title: Early Creaking
description: Creaking Mob, with Creaking Heart. Server-side mod!
body:
Server-side creaking mod for 1.21.x!
Comes with the creaking heart, activated with a log above and below the heart. 

Models and textures were made before the release of 24w40a

`summon earlycreaking:creaking`


`give @s earlycreaking:creaking_heart`
